git.ignoreCommand: bash -lc 'BASE=${VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA:-""}; if [ -z "$BASE" ]; then BASE=$(git rev-parse HEAD~1 2>/dev/null || echo ""); fi; if [ -z "$BASE" ]; then exit 1; fi; if git diff --name-only $BASE HEAD | grep -qE "^(apps/web/|package.json|package-lock.json|pnpm-lock.yaml|yarn.lock|turbo.json)"; then exit 1; else exit 0; fi'
